zh.lifeSummary: Joane Morgan於1472年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根可易其 洛維爾。她於1502年與Christopher Baynham在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾利安馬丁結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane Morgan于1472年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根可易其 洛維爾。她于1502年与Christopher Baynham在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾利安馬丁结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): from the medieval Welsh personal name Morgan, Morgant (Old Welsh Morcant, of uncertain etymology).
Irish: importation of the Welsh surname (see 1 above), to which has been assimilated more than one Gaelic surname, notably Ó Muireagáin (see Merrigan ).
Scottish: probably from a Gaelic personal name cognate with Welsh Morcant.

variants.name: Merrigan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireagáin ‘descendant of Muireagán’ a personal name derived from muir ‘sea’. Compare Morgan , with which this name has been confused.

variants.name: Morgans
meanings: Welsh (especially Glamorgan): variant of Morgan , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Joane Morgan was born in 1472, in Coychurch Lower, Glamorgan, Wales. She married Christopher Baynham in 1502, in Llanmartin, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Morganは1472年にウェールズグラモーガンコイチャーチ ロウエルで生まれた。1502年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアランマルティンでChristopher Baynhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Morgan(은)는 1472년 웨일스 글램르건 코이c후르치 로어에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 랜마틴에서 Christopher Baynham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했다.
